title: Roasted Mushrooms
body:
🍄 Roasted Mushrooms Mod

Tired of mushrooms just sitting in your inventory, only useful for suspicious stew? Spice up your survival with the Roasted Mushrooms Mod!

This lightweight mod adds the simple but satisfying ability to roast mushrooms over a campfire, furnace, or smoker. Once cooked, mushrooms become a tasty, stackable food source that restores more hunger than their raw counterparts.

Features:

    🔥 Roast red and brown mushrooms into delicious, edible snacks.

    🧺 Stackable and efficient — no more one-use stews!

    🧑‍🌾 Balanced for survival play — great for early-game food sources.

    🛠️ Works with vanilla mechanics (campfire, furnace, smoker).

Perfect for players who love foraging and want a low-effort, sustainable food option!
